texto: As parents we carry the blueprints, the dreams of what our family could be. The plans change, the whole thing goes way over budget, there are unexpected additions, and the work never ends. Still, through the messiness of construction we see each other with such depth and hope. Our five year-old boy is still so clearly the baby he once was and sometimes—can you see it?—the young man he will one day be. We draw energy and inspiration from our dreams; our simple, common motivations. --SIMPLICITY PARENTING
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Lisa Ross que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “As parents we carry the blueprints, the dreams of what our family could be. The plans change, the…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre motivacao, parenting, reflexao, com foco em mudanca e inspiracao.
